## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and upcoming improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent dip in performance attributed to cluster selection, reduced content posting, and potential Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Focus on improving share of voice in search, keyword rankings, and organic backlink growth as key SEO success indicators](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Plans to optimize meta titles/descriptions for high-impression, low-click content and refresh underperforming pieces](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Need for deeper data analysis on cluster performance to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Topics

### Content Implementation Progress

  - [Banners for resources being implemented](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Blog featured section still in development](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Images uploaded to library for resource selection](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Refresher flow updates discussed](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [Recent weeks show lower performance](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Factors: cluster selection with lower search volume, reduced content posting due to legal reviews](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Google algorithm change (outro) potentially impacting results](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [30-day period needed for clearer view post-algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Legal Review Bottleneck

  - [Brodie acknowledges delay in reviewing legal blogs](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Importance of accurate legal content for marketing and sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Team to supplement with less sensitive content while building in longer review times](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Data Analysis Improvements

  - [Request for deeper cluster analysis, especially share of voice in search](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Need to track organic backlink growth and sources](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Focus on expanding successful clusters (e.g., translation, safety compliance)](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Keyword position tracking for top 100 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### SEO Strategy Adjustments

  - [Optimizing meta titles and descriptions for high-impression, low-click content](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Refreshing low-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Continuing focus on enterprise-related clusters](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Monitoring keyword rankings (e.g., "employee texting" improved from position 11 to 3)](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Performance Metrics Discrepancy

  - [SEMrush data shows larger traffic drop than Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Team considers Google Search Console as single source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [SEMrush drop potentially due to one article losing rankings for multiple unrelated keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sadira to provide share of voice in search data for next week](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Jessica to send 100 keyword list for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Sadira to deliver cannibalization report by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Team to focus on improving share of voice, keyword rankings, and organic backlink growth](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Optimize meta titles/descriptions for high-impression, low-click content](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Refresh underperforming content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Continue monitoring impact of Google algorithm changes over 30-day period](https://fathom.video/share/mgHQDziyb8gv4qPMUeQxUA6mxyik2XHi?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
